fluxer.js.Comment: Configuration data for @fluxerjs/core Client options. See: https://github.com/fluxerjs/core

fluxer-api.Comment: Configuration options for a fluxer REST client if self-hosting. See: https://docs.fluxer.app

comment-radio.message: If you have radio stations you'd like to connect, add them to the array below. Radio stations must be rendered like following:

station.name: zamrock
station.url: url to stream from; this will be kept private

dashboardUrl: The url the dashboard is accessible with.
sessionSecret: secret for the expressjs session middleware; https://www.npmjs.com/package/express-session#user-content-secret
geniusToken: Genius access token (Used for lyrics); optional
Comment: The above specifies the time in ms after which a player goes inactive; Optional.
customStatsFooter: Text shown in the footer of the %stats embed; optional.

logging.Comment: Control which log categories appear in the console. Set 'enabled' to false to silence everything except errors. Set any category to false to silence just that group.

timers.Comment: All timing values in milliseconds (ms). 1000ms = 1 second, 60000ms = 1 minute.
